name: eGP
notes: Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
definition: Zimbabwe's electronic government procurement portal, the national public-procurement channel under PRAZ.

name: Commitment
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: A budget reservation raised before ordering, preventing overspend.

name: Vote / budget line
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The approved budget subdivision against which spend is controlled.

name: Ratepayer account
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The property-linked account billed for rates and municipal services.

name: Virement
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: An approved transfer between budget lines under delegation rules.

name: Audit finding
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: An issue raised in an audit requiring tracked remediation; the statutory audit regime is a declared research gap.

name: Delegation of authority
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The approval matrix defining who may commit and approve at each threshold.
